questionHtml: Determine, using the graph, whether the gas acts as an ideal gas.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

Graph shown is a straight line/linear
OR
expected graph should be a straight line/linear ✓

If ideal then T intercept must be at T = −273 °C ✓

Use of y = mx+c to show that x = −273 °C when y = 0 ✓
(hence ideal)

ALTERNATIVE 2

Calculates pVT for two different points ✓
Obtains 1.50 «J K−1» for both ✓

States that for ideal gas pVT=nR which is constant and concludes that gas is ideal ✓

meta.title: Determine, using the graph, whether the gas acts as an ideal gas.
